description: Detect marker genes for each leaf branch.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.DetectLeafGenes GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.DetectLeafGenes is a GenePattern module that Detect marker genes for each leaf branch.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: data.file, output.filename, cutoff.zscore, cutoff.pvalue, percentile.expr
- Optional: root, preference, use.precomputed

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/leaf_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <root> <preference> <cutoff.zscore> <cutoff.pvalue> <percentile.expr> <use.precomputed> -n_jobs <job.cpuCount>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_detectleafgenes\:0.10

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: The starting node for detecting leaf genes.

parameters.name: preference
parameters.description: The preference of nodes. The branch with speficied nodes are preferred and will be dealt with first. The higher ranks the node have, The earlier the branch with that node will be analyzed.  Comma delimited eg S3,S4

parameters.name: cutoff.zscore
parameters.description: The z-score cutoff used for mean values of all leaf branches.

parameters.name: cutoff.pvalue
parameters.description: The p value cutoff used for Kruskal-Wallis H-test and post-hoc pairwise Conover\u00e2??s test.

parameters.name: percentile.expr
parameters.description: Between 0 and 100. Between 0 and 100. Specify the percentile of gene expression greater than 0 to filter out some extreme gene expressions.

parameters.name: use.precomputed
parameters.description: If True, the previously computed scaled gene expression will be used.
